_note: Hotel additions for thin-coverage cities. Schema matches existing cities.json / cities-extras-*.json hotel objects exactly: area, tier (luxury|mid|budget), priceFrom, bestFor (array), whyStay. All hotels verified to exist on Booking.com as of April 2026.

mersin.name: Sahil Martı Hotel
mersin.whyStay: Beachfront 4-star in Mezitli with private sand area, Turkish bath and sea-view rooms — the easiest swim-out-of-bed option in Mersin.

mersin.name: Rain Hotel Mersin
mersin.whyStay: Clean modern budget hotel in central Yenişehir, walkable to the seafront promenade — strong reviews for the price.

rize.name: Ayder Villa de Pelit Hotel
rize.whyStay: Highest-rated boutique lodge on the plateau (9.1 on Booking) — wooden chalet rooms, rooftop terrace, locally-loved breakfast.

rize.name: Ayder Koru Hotel
rize.whyStay: Long-running plateau hotel surrounded by forest with a proper restaurant and 24-hour front desk — reliable when others are booked.

rize.name: Ayder Palazzo Resort
rize.whyStay: 4-star with the most modern rooms in Ayder — mountain-view balconies, garden terrace, the polished option in a rustic plateau.

rize.name: Çathan Art Hotel
rize.whyStay: Riverside budget pick in Çamlıhemşin near Zilkale — basic but characterful, good base for the Fırtına Valley without Ayder prices.

ankara.name: Sheraton Ankara Hotel & Convention Center
ankara.whyStay: Cylindrical Çankaya landmark with 9.3 location score — indoor pool, jazz bar, walking distance to Tunalı Hilmi.

ankara.name: Wyndham Ankara
ankara.whyStay: Modern 5-star in Söğütözü business district, indoor pool and Turkish bath, 10 minutes from Anıtkabir.

ankara.name: Crowne Plaza Ankara by IHG
ankara.whyStay: Reliable IHG 5-star with the city's largest meeting facilities — go-to for conferences and government delegations.

ankara.name: Latanya Hotel Ankara
ankara.whyStay: Long-established Çankaya hotel on Gazi Mustafa Kemal Bulvarı — walkable to ministries, Kızılay and the embassy district.

ankara.name: Days Hotel by Wyndham Ankara Çankaya
ankara.whyStay: Solid mid-tier brand in upper Çankaya near Segmenler Park — free parking, restaurant, much cheaper than the diplomatic-row 5-stars.

konya.name: Hich Hotel Konya
konya.whyStay: 5-minute walk to the Mevlana Museum, restored stone-and-wood interiors, 9.1 on Booking — the boutique pick for the pilgrimage.

konya.name: Bera Mevlana Hotel - Special Category
konya.whyStay: Sits next to the Mevlana Cultural Center where the Saturday sema happens — can't get closer for the dervish ceremony.

konya.name: Rumi Hotel
konya.whyStay: 6-minute walk to Rumi's tomb, rooftop terrace, free parking — the best-value central option for a one-night Konya stop.

konya.name: Konya Dervish Hotel
konya.whyStay: Small family-run boutique near the museum — owner personally arranges sema tickets and city guides.

mardin.name: Mardius Tarihi Konak
mardin.whyStay: 700-year-old stone konak with a hammam and panoramic terrace — the most atmospheric splurge in the old city.

mardin.name: Artuklu Kervansarayi - Special Class
mardin.whyStay: 58 rooms inside a restored historical caravanserai in central Eski Mardin — bigger and easier on luggage than the steeper konaks.

mardin.name: Gazi Konagi Butik Hotel
mardin.whyStay: Stone-mansion boutique with a terrace looking straight onto Mardin Castle and the Mesopotamian plain — strong breakfast.

mardin.name: Stone Boutique Hotel
mardin.whyStay: 500-year-old Ottoman-period building turned simple boutique — the cheapest way to actually sleep inside the UNESCO old town.
